rationale: The cited 2010 JMKR paper is highly aligned with the citing paper’s core topic: both analyze U.K. grocery competition involving economy/premium/standard private-label tiers and launch effects on national-brand/private-label shares. The citing note explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior NB–PL work by modeling multitier private labels and new-product effects, which matches the cited paper’s stated contribution on economy/premium PL introductions, so this is likely more than an incidental mention.
